ddls:
CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data center where the server is located */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the server (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "os_type" TEXT /* Operating system type */,
  "model" TEXT /* Server model */,
  "cpu_cores" INTEGER /* Number of CPU cores */,
  "memory_size" INTEGER /* Total memory size in GB */,
  "disk_size" INTEGER /* Total disk size in GB */,
  "last_reboot" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last server reboot */,
  "uptime" INTEGER /* Uptime of the server in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_servers_data_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_center_id") REFERENCES data_centers ("data_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_centers" (
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the data center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the data center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data center */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the data center manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the data center */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data center was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cpu_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CPU metric */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "max_cpu_usage" TEXT /* Maximum CPU usage percentage */,
  "avg_cpu_usage" TEXT /* Average CPU usage percentage */,
  "min_cpu_usage" TEXT /* Minimum CPU usage percentage */,
  "idle_cpu_usage" TEXT /* Idle CPU usage percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpu_metrics_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory metric */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "max_memory_usage" INTEGER /* Maximum memory usage in MB */,
  "avg_memory_usage" INTEGER /* Average memory usage in MB */,
  "min_memory_usage" INTEGER /* Minimum memory usage in MB */,
  "used_memory" INTEGER /* Used memory in MB */,
  "free_memory" INTEGER /* Free memory in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_metrics_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network metric */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "traffic_in" INTEGER /* Incoming network traffic in bytes */,
  "traffic_out" INTEGER /* Outgoing network traffic in bytes */,
  "min_traffic_in" INTEGER /* Minimum incoming network traffic in bytes */,
  "min_traffic_out" INTEGER /* Minimum outgoing network traffic in bytes */,
  "total_traffic" INTEGER /* Total network traffic in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_metrics_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disk_io_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disk I/O metric */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "disc_write" INTEGER /* Disk write in bytes */,
  "disc_read" INTEGER /* Disk read in bytes */,
  "min_disc_write" INTEGER /* Minimum disk write in bytes */,
  "min_disc_read" INTEGER /* Minimum disk read in bytes */,
  "total_disc_write" INTEGER /* Total disk write in bytes */,
  "total_disc_read" INTEGER /* Total disk read in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disk_io_metrics_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the server group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the server group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the server group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the server group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_group_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_group_mapping_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_group_mapping_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES server_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was triggered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "handled" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the alert has been handled */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., performance, security) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., CPU, memory, network) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who handled the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was taken */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_analytics" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_issue" TEXT /* Predicted performance issue */,
  "probability" TEXT /* Probability of the issue occurring */,
  "recommended_action" TEXT /* Recommended action to mitigate the issue */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prediction was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictive_analytics_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)
